title: Tell Me What You Want
posterAlt: Tell Me What You Want (2024) movie poster
tmdbOverview: After his father's death, Eric Zimmerman travels to Spain to oversee his company's branches. In Madrid, he falls for Judith and engage in an intense, erotic relationship full of exploration. However, Eric fears his secret may end their affair.
synopsis: Tell Me What You Want is a 2024 romance and drama film from Spain. It has a 3.9 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 18 certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
